title: Real-time Web Application with WebSocket
description: End-to-end route for building a real-time Next.js app with Socket.io, Upstash Redis for pub/sub, authentication, and deployment to a long-running host (Railway or Fly.io).

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Set up Socket.io with a custom Node.js server for real-time bi-directional communication
Add Upstash Redis for pub/sub, message persistence, and presence tracking across server instances
Add authentication (Lucia Auth for stateful sessions, or Auth.js for OAuth)
Set up unit tests for event handlers and server logic
Containerize the app with a multi-stage Dockerfile for the custom server
Configure CI/CD pipeline to build and test on every push
Deploy to Railway or Fly.io — platforms that support persistent WebSocket connections (not Vercel)
